name: Heterogeneous B200 + Cerebras WSE-3
description: Frozen test fixture: two heterogeneous nodes -- node-0 holds 4 NVIDIA B200 GPUs, node-1 holds 4 Cerebras WSE-3 wafer-scale engines -- each keeping its own first-tier memory. Owned by the test suite so edits to the shipped Systems/ examples cannot change what these tests assert.
